title: The GENIUS Act turns 1: State of Crypto
summary: The stablecoin-focused GENIUS Act became a law a year ago.

title: Bitcoin's biggest advocate, Michael Saylor, says new plan to clean up the blockchain is 'a bad idea'
summary: Michael Saylor argues that a new proposal, BIP-110, to temporarily block "spam" data from the Bitcoin blockchain would undermine the network's neutrality and create a dangerous precedent for censorship.

title: AI is destroying the internet. Math is our only hope.
summary: The rise of autonomous AI agents necessitates the utilization of zero-knowledge proofs, argues Brian Trunzo, chief growth officer at Succinct Labs.

title: Tether's USDT hits 2-year countdown threatening its position on U.S. crypto platforms
summary: The GENIUS Act has hit its first anniversary without U.S. regulators yet meeting deadlines to write regulations, though rules will be in full effect by July 2028.

title: Kraken says simpler options can unlock crypto's next derivatives market
summary: The Wyoming-based firm launched USD-settled bitcoin and ether options, saying product design, not demand, has held back adoption.
